languages.text: {n}Мехадендриты Паскаля словно сами собой тянутся к странному покойнику.{/n} "Идентифицируй себя. Ты оператор или интерфейс?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Мехадендриты Паскаля словно сами собой тянутся к странному покойнику.{/n} "Идентифицируй себя. Ты оператор или интерфейс?"
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: {n}Pasqal's mechadendrites reach toward the strange corpse as if by themselves.{/n} "Identify yourself. Are you an operator or an interface?"
languages.original_text: {n}Мехадендриты Паскаля словно сами собой тянутся к странному покойнику.{/n} "Идентифицируй себя. Ты оператор или интерфейс?"

traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

traits.locale_text: {n}Pasqual's mechadendrites reach towards the strange corpse as if by themselves.{/n} "Identify yourself. Are you an operator or an interface?"
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

traits.locale_text: {n}Pasqal's mechadendrites reach toward the strange corpse as if by themselves.{/n} "Identify yourself. Are you an operator or an interface?"
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: {n}Pasqals Mechadendriten greifen wie von selbst nach dem fremden Leichnam.{/n} "Identifiziere dich. Bist du ein Operator oder ein Interface?"
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's mechadendrites reach toward the strange corpse as if by themselves.{/n} "Identify yourself. Are you an operator or an interface?"

languages.text: {n}Les méchadendrites de Pasqal se dirigent d'eux-mêmes vers l'étrange cadavre.{/n} "Identifiez-vous. Êtes-vous un opérateur ou une interface ?"
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's mechadendrites reach toward the strange corpse as if by themselves.{/n} "Identify yourself. Are you an operator or an interface?"

languages.text: {n}Pasqal 的机械臂像自己一样伸向那具奇怪的尸体。{/n}"请表明身份。你是操作员还是操作界面？"
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's mechadendrites reach toward the strange corpse as if by themselves.{/n} "Identify yourself. Are you an operator or an interface?"

languages.text: {n}Las mecadendritas de Pasqal se acercan al extraño cadáver como si estuvieran solas.{/n} "Identifíquese. ¿Eres un operador o un interfaz?"
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's mechadendrites reach toward the strange corpse as if by themselves.{/n} "Identify yourself. Are you an operator or an interface?"

languages.text: {n}パスカルのメカデンドライトが、まるで自分のことのように奇妙な死体に向かって伸びていく。{/n}「名を名乗れ。あなたはオペレーターですか、それともインターフェイスですか？"
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's mechadendrites reach toward the strange corpse as if by themselves.{/n} "Identify yourself. Are you an operator or an interface?"

languages.text: {n}Pasqal'ın mekadendritleri sanki kendiliğindenmiş gibi garip cesede doğru uzanıyor.{/n} "Kendinizi tanıtın. Operatör müsün yoksa arayüz mü?"
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's mechadendrites reach toward the strange corpse as if by themselves.{/n} "Identify yourself. Are you an operator or an interface?"
